desc:
A colossal and ornate gate makes you feel this is the true treasury of the castle.
Inside may lie vast practical goods, but without entry, it remains a fantasy.
Perhaps you should speak to the castle's master?

This structure lacks entrances, passively rejecting all outsiders...
Perhaps it only welcomes the castle's true allies?

You never imagined such vast space inside this capital ship before boarding...
It feels unnaturally linked to another dimension.
The warehouse brims with basic space supplies—they don't mind if you take some?

Like any capital ship, its bridge hosts an enormous database.
You suspect its secrets will be trivial once you gain access.
As unreal as the rest of this planet... May you find valuable intel here.
A database within the Primordial Workshop, hiding secrets about the so-called witches...
A rare, hidden shipyard offering custom vessels of the faction at premium prices. Refreshes stock every 30 days.
